angle: Hostie is the autonomous AI host that runs the whole property while you watch.
brief: Rebuild the shipped Hostie hero as an animated Remotion ad. Copy side: channels badge, oversized headline, two-tone subhead, and the Connect your Airbnb CTA. Phone side: Hostie in a clean panel, avatar orb, Hostie AI verified, the De Beauvoir listing pill, a grey reply bubble, and a proactive check-in card with a live green pulse. Restrained Linear/Stripe motion; the read is control without being involved.

copy.headline: Your autonomous AI host
copy.subhead: The general AI host that runs your property end to end. Bookings, guests, cleaning, and pricing, all handled while you watch.
